title: Medal of Honor
categories: Daily Hitmen White Tadpole Drop Boost

params.name: Medal of Honor
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.09%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (810k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On June 2, 1863, an act of Congress was passed to award the Congressional Gold Medals.

To be awarded a Medal of Honor, one must demonstrate bravery, self-sacrifice, and fearlessness. Receiving it does not entitle the recipient to special privileges. This medal has a very important status in America. General M. once said that he sold his heart for a Medal of Honor. Truman said that he would rather have this medal than be president. 

[Perks]

Take a Military Airlift Command plane for free. Your  …
